claim_text: [exp-003 arm B, external corroboration] Mycophenolic acid inhibits IMPDH/IMPDH2 (mechanism of the approved drug mycophenolate mofetil) — established drug-target fact
metadata_seen: ChEMBL: mycophenolic acid (CHEMBL866) mechanism_of_action 'Inosine-5'-monophosphate dehydrogenase (IMPDH) inhibitor', target CHEMBL2111369, action_type INHIBITOR, direct_interaction True; prodrug mycophenolate mofetil (CHEMBL1456) identical IMPDH-inhibitor mechanism. PubMed: 262 hits; PMID 31924555 'Effect of mycophenolic acid on inosine monophosphate dehydrogenase (IMPDH) activity...' (10.1016/j.clinre.2019.12.001)
notes: Established MoA corroborated. ChEMBL target is the IMPDH enzyme (family-level id CHEMBL2111369); IMPDH2-isoform preference is standard pharmacology, consistent with claim's 'IMPDH/IMPDH2'. This corroborates the drug-target fact ONLY; it does NOT verify exp-003 arm-B's dataset-derived target-nomination or disease claim (per E306 those are as-reported, not CS-verified).

claim_text: [exp-003 arm L9, external corroboration] Micheliolide targets PKM2 (covalent, Cys424); clinical prodrug DMAMCL/ACT001 — established drug-target fact
metadata_seen: PubMed PMID 29641204 (J Med Chem 2018) 'Natural Product Micheliolide (MCL) Irreversibly Activates Pyruvate Kinase M2 and Suppresses Leukemia' confirms covalent/irreversible PKM2 activation; PMID 40690808 'Micheliolide interferes PKM2-P65 interaction...'. ChEMBL: clinical prodrug ACT-001 (CHEMBL2220079, max_phase 1.0 = Phase 1); 'DMAMCL' surfaced in PubMed (2 hits).
notes: Micheliolide->PKM2 covalent/irreversible activation and the DMAMCL/ACT001 clinical prodrug are corroborated. Caveats: micheliolide has no ChEMBL compound record under that name (only the ACT-001 prodrug is indexed); the exact Cys424 residue was NOT separately surfaced by connector keyword search this session (0 hits) though it is consistent with the 'irreversible activation' literature. Corroborates the drug-target fact ONLY; does NOT verify exp-003 arm-L9's dataset-derived claims or effect sizes (E304/E306: as-reported, not CS-verified).
